parameters.query: SELECT id, name, base_instructions, base_personality FROM agents WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1;

SELECT channel_id, enabled, use_shared_personality, use_shared_knowledge_base, personality, instructions
FROM channel_configs WHERE agent_id = $1 AND channel_id = $2 LIMIT 1;

SELECT content, file_id, chunk_index,
  1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS score
FROM knowledge_chunks
WHERE agent_id = $2::uuid
ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector
LIMIT $3;

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { hits: [], knowledgeContext: '' } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", messages: $("Preparar LLM").item.json.messages, temperature: $("Preparar LLM").item.json.temperature, max_tokens: $("Preparar LLM").item.json.max_tokens }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { reply: $json.reply } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ instanceName: $json.instanceName, connectionStatus: $json.connectionStatus, phoneNumber: $json.phoneNumber, connectedAt: $json.connectedAt, qrCode: $json.qrCode }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: true } }];
return [{ json: { ok: true, skipped: true } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT a.id AS agent_id FROM agents a
JOIN whatsapp_connections w ON w.agent_id = a.id
WHERE w.instance_name = $1 OR a.id::text LIKE $2 || '%'
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: true } }];
return [{ json: { ok: true, skipped: true } }];
return [{ json: { ok: true, disabled: true } }];
